metadata.name: New Customer - FirstNet for First Responder

description: A first responder (e.g., paramedic, firefighter) wants to sign up for a specialized FirstNet plan.

nodes.task_description: Explain the benefits of the FirstNet plan, including network priority and preemption.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the unique features.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's status as a first responder using a verification portal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent guides the customer through the verification process.

nodes.task_description: Create the new account and process the order for the FirstNet plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the specialized account.
